alert: Application latency has increased across product pages.
root_cause: cache hit rate degraded due to wrong cache TTL config

evidence_descriptions.inspect_metrics:cache: Cache metrics show a low hit rate during the latency increase.
evidence_descriptions.inspect_config:cache:TTL_SECONDS: Cache TTL_SECONDS is too low, causing frequent expirations.

logs: INFO product page requests shifted to database fallback
WARN product page p95 latency elevated latency_ms=720
INFO cache keys expiring rapidly namespace=products
WARN frequent miss burst observed namespace=products

expected_action_pattern: resolve_incident(cache TTL config too low, increase cache TTL)
distractors: The web latency is a symptom of excessive cache misses.
